## Problem

What are you trying to do, and what's getting in the way?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. Note any impact on the security invariants in
`CONTRIBUTING.md` (publish gate, MCP-only egress, no secrets in repo, tenant separation).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed.

## Additional context

Anything else — links, prior art, screenshots.
